message: Each template that a kind of engine file is written from sets out, at its top, the required shape for that kind of file — which sections must appear, which may, and a length budget. The engine now reads that shape straight from the template and checks every file of that kind against it, so a template with a broken shape setting would quietly break the check for all of them. This check makes sure every template's shape settings are well-formed. If it goes red, it names the template and what is wrong; the fix is to correct the settings at the top of that template to match the shape the others use.
